name: inventory-urdu
description: Inventory Urdu — Multi-tenant Installment (Qist) Management System

scripts.hostinger:build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run db:generate -w @inventory-urdu/api && npm run build -w @inventory-urdu/api
scripts.hostinger:build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @inventory-urdu/web
scripts.hostinger:build: npm run build:shared && npm run db:generate -w @inventory-urdu/api && npm run build -w @inventory-urdu/api && npm run build -w @inventory-urdu/web
